{
  "executive_summary": "Integration architecture for a logistics platform connecting three external systems (SAP ERP via SFTP/XML, DHL Carrier API via REST/webhooks, and a Kafka-based Analytics Platform) using an event-driven backbone with dedicated Anti-Corruption Layers per external system. The design isolates each integration behind clear boundaries, ensures the 500ms webhook SLA via async processing, and provides a single internal event stream that feeds all downstream consumers including

content.thinking: Let me design the integration architecture for this logistics platform with three external systems.
